# 📝 Notes

May 20, 2026

## Meeting May 20, 2026 at 09:06 CEST

Meeting records [Transcript](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1RLvJjZigR4aexgDb9LZ_mvZdNLs8knQ2LGXghiUod0o/edit?usp=drive_web&tab=t.7ly5wxknawe4) 

### Summary

Project onboarding workflows and advanced technical infrastructure discussions defined the strategy for long-term email marketing success.

**Project Onboarding and Strategy**  
Onboarding covers master foundations and sub-avatar profiles for email flows. Design and copy must align with visual brand standards.

**Technical Infrastructure Adoption**  
Adoption of Hermes Agent replaces Claude for superior automation performance. This multi-agent architecture utilizes complex orchestrators to handle interconnected business knowledge bases.

**Advanced AI and Biohacking**  
AI-driven video ad generation provides competitive advantages for marketing efforts. Productivity protocols for human optimization were shared to support long-term output.

*Rate this Summary:* [Helpful](https://google.qualtrics.com/jfe/form/SV_4YkxrBAaiTVqYCi?isGoogler=false&isHelpful=true) or [Not Helpful](https://google.qualtrics.com/jfe/form/SV_4YkxrBAaiTVqYCi?isGoogler=false&isHelpful=false)

### Decisions

We've **updated the Decisions section** using your feedback.

Let us know what you think: [Helpful](https://google.qualtrics.com/jfe/form/SV_5p6FWBVWvynleNU?isGoogler=no&isHelpful=yes) or [Not Helpful](https://google.qualtrics.com/jfe/form/SV_5p6FWBVWvynleNU?isGoogler=no&isHelpful=no)

## ALIGNED

* **Design and copy review process** A project review protocol is established requiring all design and copy work to be approved by Giuliano before going live.

* **Post-completion payment terms** Payment for services will be executed upon project completion rather than upfront.

### Next steps

- [ ] \[Giuliano\] Send briefings: Deliver flow briefings to Ayoub El Assri for project implementation.

- [ ] \[Giuliano\] Send files: Provide zip files and HTML assets to Ayoub El Assri.

- [ ] \[Ayoub El Assri\] Process documents: Use agents to scan and learn from the provided research and foundation files.

- [ ] \[Ayoub El Assri\] Review work: Present designs and copy to Giuliano for approval before taking them live.

- [ ] \[Ayoub El Assri\] Complete project: Finish onboarding tasks and flow configurations within 3 days.

- [ ] \[Ayoub El Assri\] Schedule call: Arrange a meeting with Giuliano to set up the agent configuration.

- [ ] \[The group\] Schedule Meeting: Coordinate a time next week to discuss progress and project strategies.

- [ ] \[Giuliano\] Research Biohacking: Conduct research on the health supplements and protocols mentioned by Ayoub El Assri.

- [ ] \[Giuliano\] Send Files: Transmit the project documentation to Ayoub El Assri to enable the start of the next phase.

### Details

*Did the screenshots in this section make your notes [better](https://goo.gle/44IH7J9) or [worse](https://goo.gle/4b5ZWtJ)?*

* **Onboarding and Initial Project Setup**: Giuliano instructs Ayoub El Assri to upload all provided research documents into Claude and copy the project instructions ([00:02:20](#00:02:20)). The goal is to establish a clean and simple onboarding process for the new project ([00:03:20](#00:03:20)).

* **Document Overview and Avatar Segmentation**: Giuliano outlines the provided documentation, which includes the "Master Foundations" document for general understanding and specific profiles for three sub-avatars: level two children, level three children, and a general autism parent profile ([00:03:20](#00:03:20)). Ayoub El Assri confirms they already have a multi-agent system configured to process these materials ([00:05:46](#00:05:46)).

* **General Fallback and Usage Guides**: Giuliano describes the "general fallback" document, which is designed to handle users who do not sign up for popups or fail to provide specific information regarding their child's level ([00:04:31](#00:04:31)). Additionally, a usage guide for IB is provided, which Ayoub El Assri or their agents should scan for approximately 30 minutes to gain a sufficient surface-level understanding ([00:05:46](#00:05:46)).

* **Workflow and Flow Briefings**: Giuliano explains the workflow where agents will scan and internalize the project data to understand the strategy. Giuliano will provide flow briefings—structured directions rather than verbatim copy—for segments like welcome and post-purchase flows, while other flows such as cart abandonment will be applied universally across all avatars ([00:06:41](#00:06:41)) ([00:10:12](#00:10:12)).

* **Email Marketing Asset Details**: Giuliano will provide zip files and HTML assets to assist with the build. The briefings will include essential details such as flow names, mailing positions, avatar levels, timing, and three subject lines with preheaders. The email footers are fixed and include specific customer support messages from Lena, as well as social media icons and unsubscribe links ([00:08:58](#00:08:58)).

* **Design and Copy Review Process**: Ayoub El Assri will produce the designs and copy, but these must be reviewed by Giuliano before going live. The design should follow the "more childish" visual style previously shared, with Ayoub El Assri focusing on the design DNA while disregarding the placeholder copy ([00:11:45](#00:11:45)).

* **Project Timeline and Payment**: Ayoub El Assri proposes completing the work in the next three days before requesting payment. They agree to this schedule, and Giuliano expresses interest in a potential long-term partnership if the work is high quality, noting that previous freelancers struggled with product standards ([00:13:20](#00:13:20)).

* **Networking and Future Opportunities**: Giuliano plans to attend an eight-figure mastermind event in Bangkok in three days and offers to facilitate introductions for Ayoub El Assri ([00:13:20](#00:13:20)). Ayoub El Assri mentions potential commission for these referrals, but Giuliano declines, preferring to make connections based on their friendship ([00:14:03](#00:14:03)).

* **Introduction to Advanced AI Models**: Ayoub El Assri advises against relying solely on Claude, suggesting the use of more sophisticated frameworks like Hermes Agent or Codex ([00:14:03](#00:14:03)). Hermes Agent is described as a complex, high-performance system that requires a time-intensive setup process but offers superior capabilities ([00:14:49](#00:14:49)).

* **Technical Setup of Hermes Agent**: Ayoub El Assri details the installation process for Hermes Agent via the Mac OS terminal, which involves running the system on a 24/7 server or VPS ([00:15:41](#00:15:41)) ([00:17:40](#00:17:40)). The framework supports multiple API providers, including Anthropic, OpenAI Codex, and various custom providers, allowing for the use of advanced models such as Kimi 2.6 or Deepseek V4 Pro ([00:16:50](#00:16:50)).

* **Multi-Agent System Architecture**: The Hermes setup utilizes a multi-agent architecture with an orchestrator acting as a "mafia boss" managing various specialized "soldiers" ([00:19:28](#00:19:28)) ([00:27:01](#00:27:01)). The system includes a "Future Self" agent for personal development and a "Strategic Council" that uses six distinct advisor roles to facilitate decision-making ([00:18:28](#00:18:28)) ([00:27:01](#00:27:01)).

* **Comparison of Claude and Hermes Agent**: Ayoub El Assri argues that Claude is less efficient due to credit limits and higher costs, whereas the Hermes agent system is more potent and cost-effective when utilized with custom API providers ([00:20:24](#00:20:24)).

* **Capability Demonstration of the Knowledge Base**: Ayoub El Assri demonstrates an interconnected "brain" using Obsidian, a system containing 20,000 files ([00:22:15](#00:22:15)) ([00:28:06](#00:28:06)). This knowledge base functions similarly to a human brain, allowing the agent to provide answers grounded in an extensive, interconnected library of research and course materials ([00:22:15](#00:22:15)) ([00:24:56](#00:24:56)).

  ![][image1]

* **Practical Application of Hermes Agent**: Ayoub El Assri explains how the agent automates business tasks by scraping and transcribing course videos and PDFs into the knowledge base ([00:24:06](#00:24:06)) ([00:31:49](#00:31:49)). The agent can perform day-to-day business operations, such as building Klaviyo welcome flows or offering strategic advice based on the brand's specific fundamentals ([00:28:06](#00:28:06)).

* **AI Ad Creation Demonstration**: Ayoub El Assri presents a video demonstrating an AI tool that generates video ads by accepting a script, a selected style (such as claymation), and visual directions ([00:34:39](#00:34:39)). The tool, which integrates with Hicksfield, successfully generated a seven-segment advertisement in five minutes ([00:34:57](#00:34:57)).

  ![][image2]

* **Competitive Landscape in AI Automation**: Ayoub El Assri emphasizes that maintaining a competitive edge requires staying informed through sources like Twitter and implementing advanced automation systems. They warn that those who do not adopt sophisticated AI agents will be left behind as the market evolves ([00:36:22](#00:36:22)).

* **Biohacking and Supplement Protocol**: Ayoub El Assri recommends a biohacking protocol for productivity and recovery, specifically suggesting the use of modafanil, Thiamax (Vitamin B1), and pinealon ([00:38:07](#00:38:07)). Giuliano expresses intent to research these recommendations, which Ayoub El Assri presents as a method for enhancing daily performance and longevity ([00:39:08](#00:39:08)).

*You should review Gemini's notes to make sure they're accurate. [Get tips and learn how Gemini takes notes](https://support.google.com/meet/answer/14754931)*

*How is the quality of **these specific notes?** [Take a short survey](https://google.qualtrics.com/jfe/form/SV_9vK3UZEaIQKKE7A?confid=ty8TGhtU6MX8ZXKH-NTzDxIXOAIIigIgABgDCA&detailid=standard&screenshot=true) to let us know your feedback, including how helpful the notes were for your needs.*
